title: Promega Magnesil Total RNA Mini Isolation System
author: Opentrons
materials: Bead drying- pause to let beads air dry.

steps.title: This protocol automates the paramagnetic bead-based...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the paramagnetic bead-based purification of DNA-free total RNA for up to 96 samples using the [Promega Magnesil Total RNA Mini Isolation System](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/sci-promega-magnesil-total-rna-mini-isolation-system/MagneSil+Total+RNA+mini-Isolation+System+TB328.pdf). Links: * [Promega Magnesil Total RNA Mini Isolation System](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/sci-promega-magnesil-total-rna-mini-isolation-system/MagneSil+Total+RNA+mini-Isolation+System+TB328.pdf) This protocol was developed to perform the following steps using the Promega Magnesil Total RNA Mini Isolation System: Bead binding, a wash step, DNAseI treatment and DNase inactivation, two additional washes followed by elution.

steps.title: Binding- mix beads and input samples...
steps.instruction: Binding- mix beads and input samples in wells of deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to liquid waste reservoir.

steps.title: Wash1- transfer wash buffer from reagent...
steps.instruction: Wash1- transfer wash buffer from reagent reservoir to wells of the deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix beads with wash, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to the liquid waste reservoir.

steps.title: DNAseI treatment transfer DNAseI to wells...
steps.instruction: DNAseI treatment transfer DNAseI to wells of deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, pause to incubate.

steps.title: DNase inactivation- transfer DNase inactivation buffer...
steps.instruction: DNase inactivation- transfer DNase inactivation buffer to wells of deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, pause to incubate, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to liquid waste reservoir.

steps.title: Wash2,Wash3 - transfer wash buffer from...
steps.instruction: Wash2,Wash3 - transfer wash buffer from reagent reservoir to wells of the deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix beads with wash, engage magnets, transfer supernatants to the liquid waste reservoir.

steps.title: Elution- transfer elution buffer to wells...
steps.instruction: Elution- transfer elution buffer to wells of deep well plate on the Magnetic Module, mix, engage magnets, transfer eluate to elution plate held at 4 degrees on the Temperature Module.
